text: //26, :48 PM Intensive Fisheries Development Programme – Subsidy on IFDPSCFWV Intensive Fisheries Development Programme – Subsidy on Commercial Four-Wheeler Vehicles STATE 🎯 Farmer 🎯 Skill Overview Eligibility Benefits How to Apply References Details The scheme aims to strengthen the fisheries value chain by providing transportation support to fish farmers. Under this scheme, eligible fish farmers receive subsidy of 25% of the actual cost on the purchase of commercial four-wheeler vehicle used for fisheries-related activities. About This Scheme The "Subsidy on Commercial Four-Wheeler Vehicles" is scheme component under the Intensive Fisheries Development Programme, implemented by the Fisheries Department, Government of Haryana. The scheme aims to strengthen the fisheries value chain by providing transportation support to fish farmers. Under this scheme, eligible fish farmers receive subsidy of 25% of the actual cost on the purchase of commercial four-wheeler vehicle used for fisheries-related activities. Benefits Subsidy under the scheme is provided at the rate of 25% of the actual cost of the four-wheeler (₹ lakh) or ₹.25 lakh, whichever is lower. Eligibility Criteria The applicant should be permanent resident of Haryana. https://projectsarthi.com/schemes/socfwv/ /
source: Intensive Fisheries Development Programme – Subsidy on.pdf

text: //26, :48 PM Intensive Fisheries Development Programme – Subsidy on The applicant should possess valid Parivar Pehchan Patra (PPP). The applicant should be at least 18 years of age. Exclusions The applicant should not be employed in any government or semi-government institution/organization. Application Process Apply Offline Registration Process on Antyodaya-SARAL Portal: Step : Visit the Official Portal: Antyodaya-SARAL Portal. Step : For registration, click on “New User/Register Here” and fill in all the mandatory details .. Name, Email ID, Mobile Number & password. Click on ‘Submit’. Step : Verify the OTP received in the provided Email and Mobile Number. Alternatively, click on the Verification Link to activate the profile. Login to Apply for the Scheme: Step : Visit the Official Portal: Antyodaya-SARAL Portal. Step : The “Sign in here” option is available on the right side of the screen. Fill in the required credentials and click on the ‘Login’ button. https://projectsarthi.com/schemes/socfwv/ /
